plurals.name: delete_file_dialog_content
plurals.item: Once deleted, the file cannot be recovered.
Once deleted, the files cannot be recovered.

plurals.name: delete_playlist_hint
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to delete this playlist?
Are you sure you want to delete these playlists?

plurals.name: delete_song_dialog_content
plurals.item: Once deleted, the song cannot be recovered.
Once deleted, the songs cannot be recovered.

plurals.name: delete_song_from_device
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to delete this song from device?
Are you sure you want to delete these songs from device?

plurals.name: delete_song_in_album
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to delete this album and %s it contains?
Are you sure you want to delete these album and %s it contains?

plurals.name: delete_song_in_artist
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to delete this artist and %s it contains?
Are you sure you want to delete these artists and %s it contains?

plurals.name: delete_tip_all_fail
plurals.item: Failed, Lark Video doesn‘t have permission to delete this video
Failed, Lark Video doesn’t have permission to delete these videos

plurals.name: delete_video_dialog_content
plurals.item: Once deleted, the video cannot be recovered.
Once deleted, the videos cannot be recovered.

plurals.name: delete_video_playlist_hint
plurals.item: Are you sure to delete the playlist？Your videos will not be deleted
Are you sure to delete %d playlists？Your videos will not be deleted

plurals.name: delete_video_playlist_tip
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to delete the playlist？
Are you sure you want to delete the playlists？

plurals.name: file_move_to_recently_deleted_snack
plurals.item: %1$d file has been moved to “Recently deleted”
%1$d files have been moved to “Recently deleted”

plurals.name: file_not_exist_sdcard_unmount
plurals.item: Something is wrong with the SD card. Refresh or remove this file from the list.
Something is wrong with the SD card, refresh or remove all of these %d files from the list.

plurals.name: multiple_delete_from_device
plurals.item: Permanently delete %d video from your device?
Permanently delete %d videos from your device?

plurals.name: new_songs_title
plurals.item: New song added, touch to play now.
%1$d new songs added, touch to play now.

plurals.name: new_songs_title_new
plurals.item: New song added, tap to play now.
%1$d new songs added, tap to play now.

plurals.name: new_videos_title
plurals.item: New video is added, touch to play now.
%1$d new videos are added, touch to play now.

plurals.name: new_videos_title_new
plurals.item: New video is added, tap to play now.
%1$d new videos are added, tap to play now.

plurals.name: playlist_delete_message
plurals.item: 1 video will be moved to Recently deleted and will be deleted after 30 days.
%1$d videos will be moved to Recently deleted and will be deleted after 30 days.

plurals.name: remove_song_in_playlist
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to remove this song from the playlist?
Are you sure you want to remove these songs from the playlist?

plurals.name: remove_video_from_playlist_hint
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to remove this video from the playlist?
Are you sure you want to remove %d videos from the playlist?

plurals.name: remove_video_from_playlist_tip
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to remove this video from the playlist？
Are you sure you want to remove these videos from the playlist？

plurals.name: trash_file_dialog_content
plurals.item: 1 file will be moved to “Recently deleted” and will be deleted after 30 days.
%d files will be moved to “Recently deleted” and will be deleted after 30 days.

plurals.name: trash_song_dialog_content
plurals.item: 1 song will be moved to “Recently deleted” and will be deleted after 30 days.
%d songs will be moved to “Recently deleted” and will be deleted after 30 days.

plurals.name: trash_video_dialog_content
plurals.item: 1 video will be moved to “Recently deleted” and will be deleted after 30 days.
%d videos will be moved to “Recently deleted” and will be deleted after 30 days.
